auth.loginDescInvite: Sign in and we'll take you to the invitation.
auth.sentConfirmation: We've sent a confirmation link to
auth.checkInbox: Please check your inbox and click the link to verify your account.
auth.getStarted: Get started with CRM Template for WhatsApp
auth.verifyJoin: Verify your email, then accept the invitation to join your team.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.resetDesc: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
auth.sentResetLink: We've sent a password reset link to
auth.passwordMinChars: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.newPasswordNoMatch: New password and confirmation do not match

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Live analytics across conversations, contacts, deals, broadcasts, and automations.
dashboard.activityHint: Activity from messages, deals, broadcasts, and automations will appear here.
dashboard.noMessages: No message activity in this range
dashboard.messageHint: Send or receive messages to start populating this chart.
dashboard.dealHint: Create deals in Pipelines to see stage breakdowns here.
dashboard.responseDesc: Minutes to reply to a customer's first unreplied message, by weekday
dashboard.repliesHint: This chart fills in as you reply to customer messages.

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.whatsappNotConnected: WhatsApp® is not connected. Go to Settings to connect your account.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone, or email...
contacts.selectAll: Select all contacts on this page
contacts.name: Name
contacts.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete

pipelines.title: Pipelines
pipelines.createPipelineDesc: Create a pipeline to start tracking deals
pipelines.defaultStages: Default stages (New Lead → Won) will be created automatically.

broadcasts.title: Broadcasts
broadcasts.description: Send bulk messages to your contacts using approved templates.
broadcasts.noBroadcastsDesc: Create your first broadcast to reach your contacts at scale.
broadcasts.name: Name
broadcasts.nameRequired: Give the broadcast a name before saving a draft.

broadcastNew.title: New Broadcast
broadcastNew.description: Create and send a broadcast message to your contacts.

automations.title: Automations
automations.description: Build workflows that react to WhatsApp® events automatically.
automations.noAutomationsDesc: Pick a template above or create one from scratch.
automations.deleteAutomationDesc: This permanently removes {name} and its execution history. This cannot be undone.

flows.title: Flows
flows.description: Build branching, button-driven WhatsApp conversations. Useful for menus, FAQs, and triage before a human steps in.
flows.createDialogDesc: Start from a template or build from scratch.
flows.noFlowsDesc: Build your first conversation — a welcome menu, an order lookup, an FAQ bot. Customers tap buttons; the bot routes them to the right answer (or the right agent).
flows.deleteConfirm: Delete "{name}"? Any active runs will end immediately.
flows.firstInbound: Triggers on a contact's first-ever inbound message

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Everything in one place — your account and your workspace. Pick a section to manage it.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.description: How you show up across the app. Your avatar and name appear in the header, sidebar, and anywhere your teammates see you.
profile.uploadHint: PNG, JPG, WebP, or GIF. Up to 2 MB.
profile.profileSavedEmail: Profile saved — check your email to confirm the address change

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp connection
whatsapp.description: Connect your Meta WhatsApp Business API. Credentials, webhook, and setup steps all live here.
whatsapp.apiCredsDesc: Enter your Meta WhatsApp Business API credentials.
whatsapp.tokenHidden: Token is hidden for security. Re-enter it to update configuration.
whatsapp.verifyTokenHint: A custom string you create. Must match the token you set in Meta webhook settings.
whatsapp.webhookConfigDesc: Use this URL as your webhook callback in the Meta App Dashboard.
whatsapp.setupDesc: Follow these steps to connect your WhatsApp Business API.
whatsapp.connectionTestFailed: Connection test failed. Check network and try again.
whatsapp.configSaved: WhatsApp connected. Events will start flowing within a minute.
whatsapp.validationTokenRequired: Access Token is required for initial setup
whatsapp.validationTokenReenter: Please re-enter the Access Token to save changes

security.title: Login & security
security.description: Change your password and sign out of your devices. These keep your account safe.
security.passwordDesc: Use at least 8 characters. You will stay signed in on this device after changing it.
security.sessionsDesc: Sign out of every device where you're logged in — including this one. Useful if you lost a laptop or shared your password.
security.signOutAllDesc: Every device logged into this account will be signed out and will need to log in again. You will be redirected to the login page.

team.title: Team members
team.description: People with access to this account. Roles control what each teammate can do.
team.inviteDesc: Generate a one-time invite link. Share it via WhatsApp, Slack, or any channel you like — no email service required.
team.inviteCreatedDesc: Share this link with your new teammate. They'll be able to sign up (or sign in) and join the account as
team.label: Label
team.labelHint: Helps you remember who you sent the link to in the pending list below.
team.saveLinkWarning: We never store the plaintext — once you close this dialog the URL is gone. To re-share, revoke this invite and create a new one.
team.pendingInfo: The plaintext invite URL is only shown once at creation for security — to re-share, revoke the invite below and create a new one.
team.aboveToGenerate: above to generate a shareable link.
team.removeConfirm: Remove {name} from the account? They'll be signed out of this account and given a fresh personal account on their next sign-in. Their login isn't deleted.
team.clipboardBlocked: Clipboard blocked — copy the link manually

templates.title: Message templates
templates.description: Create templates and submit them to Meta for approval. Use "Sync from Meta" to pull templates approved elsewhere.
templates.noTemplatesDesc: Create your first message template to get started.
templates.submitSuccess: Submitted to Meta — typical review time is 24 hours. Status updates automatically.

fieldsTags.title: Fields & tags
fieldsTags.description: Two ways to organize contacts: colour-coded tags for quick grouping, and custom fields for structured data.
fieldsTags.tagsDesc: Colour-coded labels for grouping and filtering contacts.
fieldsTags.noTags: No tags yet — create your first one below.
fieldsTags.deleteTagConfirm: Delete the tag "{name}"? This removes it from all contacts and cannot be undone.
fieldsTags.customFieldsDesc: Extra contact fields (e.g. ZIP code, lead source). They appear on every contact and in the "Update Contact Field" automation action.

dealsCurrency.title: Deals & currency
dealsCurrency.description: The currency used for new deals and for pipeline and dashboard totals.
dealsCurrency.currencyDesc: New deals default to this currency, and pipeline and dashboard totals are shown in it. Existing deals keep the currency they were saved with.
dealsCurrency.adminOnly: Only account admins can change the default currency.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Set the mode and accent colour used across the app. Saved to this device — try it, it changes live.

join.inviteNotFoundDesc: This link doesn't match a valid invitation. Double-check the URL or ask the person who invited you to send a new one.
join.inviteUsedDesc: This invitation has already been accepted. If that wasn't you, ask the account admin to send a fresh link.
join.inviteExpiredDesc: This invitation has expired. Ask the account admin to send a new one — they take a few seconds to generate.
join.errorDesc: We couldn't verify this invitation right now. Try refreshing the page in a moment.
join.acceptInfo: Accepting moves your login into {account}. Your empty personal account from signup will be cleaned up.
join.cantJoinDesc: To join {account}, sign out and sign up again with a different email address. The invite link stays valid as long as it hasn't expired.
join.signOutDifferentEmail: Sign out & use a different email

inbox.whatsappNotConnected: WhatsApp® is not connected. Go to Settings to connect your account.
